docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PARMELES, MARY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-29-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMMONDS, JEFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARMELES, MARY $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.50 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,179.50, DEFENDANT MARY PARMELES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
